title: 1981-04-16_Pat_138.txt
key_claims: History is a battle between two great antagonists: Ecstasy (Dionysus/Christ) and Sobriety/Truth (Apollo/YHWH). Dick experienced the ecstatic secret of Christianity in 1974, and the sober truth of Judaism in 1981.

Christianity is fundamentally an ecstatic religion. The Passion and Crucifixion (Tears/Grief) are merely the mechanism; when pushed to their absolute limit, grief undergoes enantiodromia (reversal) into its mirror opposite: resurrection and ecstatic joy (Felix).
*Flow My Tears* is functionally a Christian Gospel operating on these two levels: the exoteric story of grief (King Pentheus) and the esoteric hidden promise of Joy (King Felix).

The ultimate goal of the Messianic mission is the "Third Status" (prophesied by Joachim of Fiore): direct, unmediated spiritual knowledge and union with God the Father, moving beyond the intermediary of Christ.
recurring_concepts: **Enantiodromia**: The psychological principle where an extreme force turns into its exact opposite. Absolute sorrow and humiliation (the Cross) necessarily convert into absolute joy (the Resurrection).
reading_excerpt: History is a battle between two great antagonists: Ecstasy (Dionysus/Christ) and Sobriety/Truth (Apollo/YHWH). Dick experienced the ecstatic secret of Christianity in 1974, and the sober truth of Judaism in 1981.
